title: fagelia nivalis
intro: Fagelia nivalis, also known as the Snowdonia fagelia, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Wales. It is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Gentianaceae, known for its distinctive white or pale blue flowers. The medicinal properties of Fagelia nivalis include its ability to act as a diuretic and a digestive aid, making it useful in treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and digestive disorders. Fagelia nivalis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function.
